note: Versioned, scoped calibration evidence consumed by the Session Autonomy Receipt estimator. A profile here is ONLY applied to a session whose task profile is compatible (see calibration-profiles.mjs#matchProfile). No value in this file is a global constant or a guarantee. Every profile carries claim:null and an evidence tier; only a HUMAN may elevate a claim via WF0018 (ADR-0080). Editing the numbers is ADR-gated (constitution §9); automation may only bump `updated`.

profiles.label: WF0018 #242 pilot — compozy (Go, ~217k LOC) symptom-only bug-fix tasks
profiles.note: Pilot SIGNAL, NOT a powered claim. ADR-0080 #243 gate requires >=3 matched reps and a matched-pair CI lower bound > 1.0x after Holm-Bonferroni at equal QA-green. Until a human elevates it, claim stays null and this profile yields claimType 'estimated' (never 'measured'). Apply only to compatible profiles; never as a default multiplier.
